<a id="class-csharpscript"></a>

# CSharpScript

**Inherits:** [Script](class_script.md#class-script) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A script implemented in the C# programming language, saved with the `.cs` extension (Mono-enabled builds only).

## Description

This class represents a C# script. It is the C# equivalent of the [GDScript](class_gdscript.md#class-gdscript) class and is only available in Mono-enabled Godot builds.
